Minor'S Compromise Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for four Minors' Compromises hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: James Robertson II, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: CSR: B. Fields, #7235
Eric Lifschitz, Esq. for Petitioner(s): Elisa Rodriguez, as guardian ad litem for minor Claimant Jonathan Rodriguez, and for Petitioner Bertha Arias, as guardian ad litem for minor Claimants: Roberto Arias, Ashley Verdin and Katya Arias.
Order waiving live testimony of the Petitioners was in the case file.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petitions are granted and compromise is approved.
No fees or costs from the minors' portion of the settlements.
Balance for deposit into blocked account Wells Fargo Bank, 1799 Marlow Rd., Santa Rosa, CA. 95401 until Minor's reaches the age of 18 years for each minor as follows: Jonathan Rodriguez $5,500.00, Roberto Arias $2,000.00, Ashley Verdin $2,000.00 and Katya Arias $2,250.00

Orders signed in open court.
